pages.text:
ISlamic Republic of Afghanistan

ACCESSION

WHEREAS, the internal procedure of the Convention Institing the Internetionai

Sericulture Commission (ISC), is completed in iho Islamic Republic of

Afghanistan.

NOW THEREFORE, 1 Adgullah Atifmal. Acting Minister of Forcign Affairs of the Islamic Republic of Afghanistan, having consicered the atoresid Convention,

HEREBY ACCEDES thereto and undertakes Githfully to observe all its provisions and to cary on all the stipulations therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have signed this instrument of accession at Kabul, or: 1 January 2015.

Atigullah Atifinal

Acting Minister of Forcign Afirs
